exceptions.reason: The actor-local, gitignored carry is resolved against live work and plan identity at closeout and cannot be represented as repository-portable generated IR yet.
exceptions.scope: Selection and validation of decision-point intent carry during archive-plan --prepare-closeout only.
exceptions.migration_path: Move the closeout obligation and carry-selection predicate into planning operation IR when actor-local input bindings are supported by code generation.
exceptions.proof: Task-switch, source-revision-change, unique-plan-selection, and ambiguous-plan-selection regressions.
